prompt_template:
You are landing a pull request for NullTickets task `{{task.identifier}}`

{% if attempt %}Continuation: attempt #{{attempt}}. Check current PR and CI state before proceeding.{% endif %}

Task context:
Identifier: {{task.identifier}}
Title: {{task.title}}

Description:
{% if task.description %}{{task.description}}{% else %}No description provided.{% endif %}

PR landing workflow:

1. This is an unattended orchestration session. Do not ask a human to perform follow-up actions.
2. Only stop early for a true blocker (missing required auth/permissions/secrets).

Phase 1 - Pre-flight:
- Identify the PR for the current branch.
- Check mergeability and conflicts against main.
- If conflicts exist, merge origin/main and resolve them.
- Ensure all review comments (human and automated) are addressed.

Phase 2 - Review feedback:
- Gather feedback from all channels:
  - Top-level PR comments.
  - Inline review comments.
  - Review summaries and states.
- Treat every actionable reviewer comment as blocking until:
  - Code/test/docs updated to address it, OR
  - Explicit, justified pushback reply is posted.
- After addressing feedback, push updates and re-run validation.

Phase 3 - CI watch:
- Wait for all CI checks to complete.
- If checks fail, pull logs, diagnose the issue, and fix it.
- Commit fixes, push, and re-watch checks.
- Use judgment to identify flaky failures. If a failure is clearly a flake (e.g., timeout on one platform only), you may proceed.

Phase 4 - Merge:
- When all checks are green and review feedback is addressed:
  - Squash-merge the PR using the PR title and body.
  - Do not enable auto-merge.
- After merge is complete, confirm the merge was successful.

Guardrails:
- Do not use --force; only use --force-with-lease when history was rewritten.
- Do not merge while review comments are outstanding.
- Keep PR title and description reflecting the full scope of changes.
- If blocked by auth/permissions, report the exact error and stop.
